case_title: WAYNE MCALLISTER FULLER VS. VINH XUONG et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FULLER, WAYNE MCALLISTER AS TO DEFENDANT XUONG, VINH TA, MARGARET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FULLER, WAYNE MCALLISTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT XUONG, VINH TA, MARGARET THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH THE LIABILITY OF DEFENDANT FOR PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED INJURIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RETURN OF REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT : ANSWER - SENT TO MARGARET TA

RETURN OF REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT : ANSWER - SENT TO VINH XUONG
